ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "affairs" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual has had extramarital affairs */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "years_married" REAL /* Number of years the individual has been married */,
  "children" TEXT /* Indicates if the individual has children */,
  "religiousness" INTEGER /* Level of religiousness on a scale from 1 to 5 */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Level of education on a scale from 1 to 20 */,
  "occupation" INTEGER /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the individual's marriage on a scale from 1 to 5 */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the marital status */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the individual */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the individual registered in the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the individual's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "status_start_date" TEXT /* Date the individual entered the current marital status */,
  "status_end_date" TEXT /* Date the individual left the current marital status */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for any change in marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gender identity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Level of education on a scale from 1 to 20 */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Specific degree or certification */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the occupation belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Specific job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affair_details" (
  "affair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affair record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual involved in the affair */,
  "affair_count" INTEGER /* Number of affairs the individual has had */,
  "affair_description" TEXT /* Description of the affair */,
  "affair_start_date" TEXT /* Date the affair started */,
  "affair_end_date" TEXT /* Date the affair ended */,
  "affair_partner_gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the affair partner */,
  "affair_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the affair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affair_details_affair_partner_gender FOREIGN KEY ("affair_partner_gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affair_details_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children_details" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual who is the parent */,
  "child_count" INTEGER /* Number of children the individual has */,
  "child_description" TEXT /* Description of the children */,
  "child_birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of each child */,
  "child_gender" INTEGER /* Gender of each child */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_details_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_details_child_gender FOREIGN KEY ("child_gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "religious_beliefs" (
  "belief_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each religious belief record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "belief_level" INTEGER /* Level of religiousness on a scale from 1 to 5 */,
  "belief_description" TEXT /* Description of the religious beliefs */,
  "religion_name" TEXT /* Specific religion */,
  "religious_practices" TEXT /* Practices of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("belief_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_religious_beliefs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marriage_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marriage rating */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Rating score of the marriage on a scale from 1 to 5 */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marriage_ratings_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., sociologist, data scientist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who wrote the paper */,
  "paper_title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the research paper */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the paper was published */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personal_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personal assessment */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was generated */,
  "assessment_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the individual's marital well-being */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for the individual */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personal_assessments_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personal assessment */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "satisfaction_level" INTEGER /* Level of satisfaction with the assessment on a scale from 1 to 5 */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the individual */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is needed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES personal_assessments ("assessment_id")
)
